name: HDFC Regalia
notes: Best for travel — 5x reward points on airlines & hotels (effective ~5%). Premium all-rounder.

name: SBI SimplyCLICK
notes: 10x reward points on select partners (Amazon, BookMyShow, Cleartrip) — effective ~2.5% cashback value. Flat 1% elsewhere.

name: Axis Flipkart
notes: 5% direct cashback on Flipkart & Myntra; 4% on Swiggy, PVR, Uber; 1.5% unlimited elsewhere.

name: HDFC MoneyBack+
notes: Reliable 2% CashPoints across most categories. 2x on EMI transactions. Good entry-level card.

name: ICICI Amazon Pay
notes: 5% back on Amazon (Prime members); 3% on Amazon Pay merchants & grocery; 2% elsewhere. No annual fee.

name: Amex Membership Rewards
notes: 5x MR points on Zomato, Swiggy, BookMyShow (~5% value). Limited merchant acceptance — verify before use.
